title: DEKTON Pro Light XH80 Shine HomeLight - Cob Cabinet Light 3aaa Batteries (Carbon Batteries Included)| Adjustable Lighting Modes| Beam Distance: 5m 80 Lumens Output| More Than 20hrs Working Time
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Versatile Lighting Solution: The Dekton Pro Light XH80 is designed to provide flexible lighting for any setting. Ideal for mood lighting, cabinet illumination, or night-time visibility, this compact COB cabinet light enhances your space with a bright 80 lumens output, perfect for creating a cozy ambiance or illuminating dark areas.

Adjustable Lighting Modes: Tailor your lighting experience with adjustable modes that allow you to select the perfect brightness level for your needs. Whether you need a soft glow for relaxation or a brighter light for tasks, the XH80 offers customizable settings to suit various activities and preferences.

Extended Beam Distance: Equipped with advanced COB (Chip-on-Board) technology, this night-time mood light provides an impressive beam distance of up to 5 meters. This feature ensures you have ample illumination for a wide area, making it an excellent choice for larger spaces or areas requiring extended light coverage.

Long-lasting Performance: Enjoy more than 20 hours of continuous use on a single set of batteries. The Dekton Pro Light XH80 is powered by 3 AAA carbon batteries (included), ensuring long-lasting performance and reducing the need for frequent battery changes, providing convenience and reliability.

Compact and Durable Design: Built with durability in mind, the XH80 features a robust construction that can withstand daily use. Its compact design allows for easy placement in various locations, whether mounted on a wall, placed in a cabinet, or used as a portable light source.
